creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
Adding annotation from email to GNATS:

Date: Mon, 09 Jun 2014 22:17:06 +0100
From: Jez Hancock <jez.hancock-freebsdpr@munk.me.uk>
Subject: Re: ports/190178: ClamAV 0.98.3 port build broken in unit testing

Renato - the problem appears to have been resolved for me in the
latest version 0.98.3_6.  Thanks.
